# Organization Role Assignments (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry Organization Role Assignments.

```terraform
data "foundry_organization_role_assignments" "example" {
  organization_rid = "ri.foundry.main.organization.example-organization-rid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_rid` (String) RID of the Organization. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `organization_role_assignments` (Map of Set of String) Map of Role ID to set of Principal IDs for this Organization.
